ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain information of the species */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the objectives and methods of the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "hypothesis" TEXT /* Hypothesis being tested in the experiment */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Experimental design used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bioreplicates" (
  "biorep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological replicate */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this replicate */,
  "biorep_number" INTEGER /* Biological replicate number */,
  "replicate_type" TEXT /* Type of replicate (e.g., technical, biological) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the replicate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biorep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bioreplicates_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_points" (
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this time point */,
  "time_point" REAL /* Time point in hours at which measurements were taken */,
  "sampling_method" TEXT /* Method used for sampling (e.g., destructive, non-destructive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species measured */,
  "biorep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological replicate */,
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time point at which the measurement was taken */,
  "live_counts" INTEGER /* Live counts observed */,
  "dilution_factor" REAL /* Dilution factor used during the experiment */,
  "live_cfu_ml" TEXT /* Live colony-forming units per milliliter */,
  "od600" REAL /* Optical density at 600 nm */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_time_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_point_id") REFERENCES time_points ("time_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_biorep_id FOREIGN KEY ("biorep_id") REFERENCES bioreplicates ("biorep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "actions_performed" TEXT /* Actions performed by the user (e.g., edited, shared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the experiment in degrees Celsius */,
  "ph" REAL /* pH level during the experiment */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level during the experiment */,
  "atmosphere" TEXT /* Atmospheric conditions (e.g., aerobic, anaerobic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the equipment */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this protocol */,
  "protocol_description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol used */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the protocol was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the protocol */,
  "protocol_type" TEXT /* Type of protocol (e.g., standard operating procedure, standard protocol) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocols_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this result */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of findings from the experiment */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion drawn from the experimental data */,
  "implications" TEXT /* Implications of the results */,
  "future_work" TEXT /* Suggestions for future work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital object identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this presentation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the presentation */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference at which the presentation was given */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the presentation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
